title: Services | Your Business
description: A business-site starter services page with concrete offers and clearer scope.
heroTitle: Turn broad capability into concrete services
heroText: Visitors should leave this page understanding what you offer, who each service is for, and what kinds of outcomes it supports.

cards.title: Strategy and direction
cards.text: Use this card for advisory, planning, prioritisation, or decision-support offers.

cards.title: Content and communication
cards.text: Use this space for writing, messaging, research synthesis, documentation, or stakeholder communication support.

cards.title: Operations and delivery
cards.text: Describe coordination, workflow support, project delivery, or process improvement work.

cards.title: Specialist support
cards.text: Reserve this for the specific expertise, domain, or operational strength that makes the business different.
